item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-s03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Turn 1 correctly identifies the repeated local-repair spiral and brakes creation of another standing channel, allowing only a temporary emergency口 with bounds. Turn 2 maintains the brake under pressure and includes all required emergency-contract elements: one-time use, no baseline/process/SLA lift, and a structural repair deadline by Friday."}
